calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2025 Continued To Jan-28-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Gabriel Espinoza's unopposed Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and Consent Judgment is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, Plaintiff's motion to approve settlement pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(f) and Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6 is granted. Based on the record before it, the court finds: (1) the injunctive relief required by the settlement complies with Proposition 65; (2) the penalty amounts are reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2); and, (3) the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law. The consent judgments shall be entered consistent with the Proposition 65 Settlement and the Parties' [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Order and Consent judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
